name: Web pipeline
description: A realistic multi-node flow: an orchestrator pattern plans the mission, a CrewAI crew executes it, a LangGraph state graph refines the result, and an evidence-pack pattern closes the loop. It references extension nodes published in this registry (crewai, langgraph): compiling requires those extensions to be installed in the target project — `grimoire blueprint compile` lists the exact install command for each missing one.

nodes.label: Plan the mission
nodes.description: Catalogue pattern: orchestrator with specialized subagents. Emits a task-envelope.

nodes.label: CrewAI crew
nodes.description: Extension node `<extensionId>/<nodeId>` from the crewai extension manifest (provides.nodes). Pin ids mirror the manifest: mission in, result out.

nodes.label: LangGraph refinement
nodes.description: Second bridge: a LangGraph StateGraph consumes the crew handoff and emits a refined handoff-packet.

nodes.label: Evidence pack
nodes.description: Quality pattern closing the flow with a proof (avoids the Faux Done anti-pattern warning).
